name: Asparagus & Feta Canapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim crusts from the bread and flatten with a rolling pin.
2. Blend the cheeses and egg until you have a workable consistency and spread evenly on each slice of bread.
3. Place an asparagus spear on each slice and roll up.
4. Dip each canape in melted butter to coat thoroughly.
5. Place the canapes on a cookie sheet and freeze until they are firmly frozen.
6. Once frozen, slice into bite-sized pieces.
7. (If freezing for a future date, place the bite-sized pieces in a freezer bag - do not defrost before cooking.)
8. Place the sliced canapes back on a cookie sheet and bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
